name: Real-time Events & Live Dashboard
summary: Real-time event streaming via Server-Sent Events (SSE) with Redis pub/sub backbone. Every tenant gets an isolated event stream. Frontend subscribes via useRealtimeEvents hook. Live indicator shows connection state.

components.redisEventBus: packages/events/src/redis-bus.ts — RedisEventBus wraps ioredis pub/sub, per-tenant channels

protocol: SSE (text/event-stream) — no extra package needed, built into HTTP/Fastify
backpressure: 25s heartbeat keeps proxies from timing out connection
tenantIsolation: Each tenant subscribes to reno:events:{tenantId} Redis channel
